news.title: AACR: Endeavoring to go global, Zai Lab offers reality check on China’s biotech ascent

news.title: Biogen inks $850M biobucks deal with TJ Biopharma for China rights to late-stage immune antibody
news.snippet: Following its move to secure ex-China rights to the CD38-directed antibody felzartamab, Biogen is doubling down and building on an existing partnership with local drugmaker TJ Biopharma.

news.title: Lilly picks up another in vivo CAR-T company with Kelonia buyout worth up to $7B
news.snippet: Eli Lilly is picking up its second in vivo CAR-T company of the year, paying $3.25 billion in upfront cash for Kelonia Therapeutics and its phase 1-stage myeloma therapy.

news.title: Roche boosts diagnostics offerings with $595M Saga buyout
news.snippet: Roche is handing over $595 million to bolster its Foundation Medicine business with a deal to snap up SAGA Diagnostics.

news.title: Novo readies SCD drug from $1.1B Forma buyout for approval push after phase 3 win
news.snippet: Novo Nordisk is gearing up to submit its rare blood disorder drug to the FDA after the former Forma Therapeutics asset reduced a painful complication of sickle cell disease (SCD) in a phase 3 study.

news.title: When Spray Drying Falls Short: A Faster Path Forward
news.snippet: Learn how early intervention can help drug developers convert suboptimal formulations into scalable, clinically viable solutions.

news.title: How WuXi AppTec’s Integrated Platform Is Helping Therapies Move Faster from Discovery to Patients
news.snippet: In a complex therapeutic landscape, WuXi AppTec is simplifying the path from discovery to patient. Find out how.

news.title: 3 bioprocessing trends—and the critical enabler that’s quietly driving them

news.title: AstraZeneca’s faith in IL-33 inhibitor continues to pay off with latest phase 3 COPD win
news.snippet: AstraZeneca’s chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) candidate has served up a third phase 3 win, offering further evidence the Big Pharma may have cracked the anti-IL-33 code.

news.title: Odyssey charts fresh voyage to public markets after abandoning IPO plans last year
news.snippet: In another sign that the biotech IPO market is heating back up, Odyssey Therapeutics has made a fresh announcement of its intention to go public.

news.title: Agenus focuses on survival data as 0% response rate triggers primary miss

news.title: Trump orders FDA to fast-track reviews of psychedelic drugs after lobbying by podcaster
news.snippet: President Donald Trump has ordered the FDA to perform priority reviews of psychedelic drugs as part of a push to clear barriers to access to treatments for serious mental illnesses.

news.title: AACR: Former Genentech leader engineers startup with vision for ‘smart’ cancer drugs
news.snippet: Just a few years ago, Daniel Chen, M.D., Ph.D., was spending his days in his backyard, sketching out designs for new antibody-drug conjugates with a friend. Now, he’s sharing with the world the result

news.title: FDA celebrates progress to end animal testing but experts warn there’s still a long way to go
news.snippet: The FDA says it has hit the one-year goals of its roadmap for ending animal testing. Experts are split on how impactful the agency's actions will be.

news.title: Sanofi touts tolerability of COVID shot Nuvaxovid in head-to-head trial vs. Moderna's mNexspike
news.snippet: Sanofi’s protein-based vaccine Nuvaxovid has topped Moderna’s next-generation messenger RNA shot mNexspike in a head-to-head trial assessing the tolerability of the two COVID vaccines.

news.title: Regulatory tracker: GSK's multiple myeloma ADC Blenrep expands to China

news.title: Biovac nets $108M finance package to build Africa’s first fully integrated vaccine plant
news.snippet: Biovac has secured a $108.3 million financing package that will allow the South African pharma company to build the continent’s first end-to-end, multi-vaccine production plant.

news.title: Genentech shifts Hemlibra marketing focus to patient stories as competition approaches

news.title: Neurogene hires new CCO as it eyes commercial future for its Rett gene therapy
news.snippet: Neurogene is looking to make the leap from a clinical biotech to a commercial biopharma with its lead gene therapy and has hired an industry veteran to take the reins.

news.title: Biogen bullish on America with Durham Bulls team up
news.snippet: Biogen and Minor League Baseball’s Durham Bulls are joining forces to celebrate “America 250” in the Triangle Community.

news.title: Bayer falls short in bid to block J&J’s survival claims in prostate cancer clash
news.snippet: In a blow to Bayer, a U.S. federal judge in Manhattan has said he will not block Johnson & Johnson’s survival claims on a key prostate cancer drug.

news.title: AbbVie launches ‘PSO Done’ psoriasis campaign with cross-agency effort
news.snippet: AbbVie is running a new psoriasis campaign based on feedback from real patients about how the condition affects their daily lives.

news.title: Agile partnerships drive faster pharma innovation

news.title: Theramex exits self-regulatory body after ‘systemic’ compliance failures
news.snippet: Theramex has opted out of the U.K.’s self-regulatory program for pharma marketing after being found to have brought discredit on the industry twice in quick succession.

news.snippet: Kelonia Therapeutics, a small biotech company, long struggled to stay afloat. Now it's been acquired by Eli Lilly for $3.25 billion.

news.title: STAT+: Extended use of Nektar Therapeutics drug shows promise in alopecia
news.snippet: Extended use of a drug from Nektar Therapeutics promoted hair growth in people with alopecia.

news.title: Pregnancy vaccine reduces baby hospital admissions for RSV by 80%
news.snippet: A study confirms the vaccine gives excellent protection for babies against life-threatening chest infections.

news.title: Rollout of Covid vaccines extraordinary feat - inquiry report
news.snippet: Covid vaccines saved hundreds of thousands of lives, but a small minority harmed need better support, says report.

news.title: Mental health support to be offered to people with diabetes in UK first
news.snippet: People with diabetes are twice as likely to have depression, a charity backing tailored support says.

news.title: Three young people contract meningitis in Weymouth
news.snippet: Young people are to be offered the MenB vaccine after three cases of meningitis were confirmed.

news.title: Lawmakers clash with RFK Jr as he shifts focus away from vaccines
news.snippet: During a three-hour hearing, the US health secretary tried to focus on chronic disease while being pressed on vaccines.

news.title: Breakthrough £90,000 Alzheimer's drugs unlikely to benefit patients, report suggests
news.snippet: A major review has provoked a backlash after concluding the medicines provide too little benefit to be noticed.

news.snippet: The fourth report from the inquiry into the pandemic said the vaccine roll-out was an "extraordinary feat".
